title: Giovanni Paolo Mariani
text:
I am a PhD student in Economics at ECARES (Université Libre de Bruxelles).
I hold a Mres Degree in Economics and Statistics from ECARES (2021). Here you can find my CV.
In My research I use a combination of spatial and administrative data to study two dimensions of inequality: housing and consumption of public goods. My agenda is supported by a research grant from the F.R.S. - F.N.R.S.
Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.
